mapper.select: SELECT a.ocr_no, a.ocr_file_no, IF(a.anals_end_dtime IS NULL , 'N', 'Y') AS completeJobYn, a.anals_status_type, b.ocr_anals_result_no, b.left_top_x_axis, b.left_top_y_axis, b.right_bottom_x_axis, b.right_bottom_y_axis, b.track_nm_skip_yn, b.artist_nm_skip_yn, d.track_id, d.track_nm, d.track_play_tm, d.adult_auth_need_track_yn, d.track_subtrct_qty, IF(d.streaming_premium_yn = 'Y' OR d.pps_yn ='Y' , 'Y', 'N') AS holdbackYn, d.disp_status_yn, IF(d.title_yn = 'Y' , 'Y', 'N') AS titleYn, d.agency_id, d.free_yn, e.album_id, e.title, e.release_ymd, IF(e.album_tp='MF', '', e.album_tp) AS albumType, g.style_nm AS genreStyle, h.album_img_size AS size, h.album_img_url AS url, i.artist_id, j.artist_nm FROM tb_ocr_file a LEFT JOIN tb_ocr_anals_result b ON b.ocr_no = a.ocr_no AND b.ocr_file_no = a.ocr_file_no LEFT JOIN tb_ocr_anals_result_track c ON c.ocr_anals_result_no = b.ocr_anals_result_no AND c.pick_yn = 'Y' LEFT JOIN tb_track d ON d.track_id = c.track_id AND d.disp_status_yn= 'Y' AND now() BETWEEN d.disp_start_dtime AND d.disp_end_dtime LEFT JOIN ted_album e ON e.album_id = d.album_id AND e.disp_status_yn= 'Y' AND now() BETWEEN e.disp_start_dtime AND e.disp_end_dtime LEFT JOIN ted_albumstyle f ON f.album_id = e.album_id LEFT JOIN ted_style g ON g.style_id = f.style_id LEFT JOIN tb_album_img h ON h.album_id = e.album_id LEFT JOIN ted_trackartist i ON i.track_id = d.track_id AND i.rp_yn = 'Y' LEFT JOIN ted_artist j ON j.artist_id = i.artist_id JOIN tb_ocr k ON a.ocr_no = k.ocr_no AND k.character_no = #{characterNo} WHERE a.ocr_no = #{ocrNo}

SELECT a.ocr_no, a.ocr_file_no, a.upload_yn, a.anals_status_type, a.anals_start_dtime, a.anals_end_dtime, a.aws_bucket_nm, a.aws_bucket_key, a.send_push_dtime FROM tb_ocr_file a JOIN tb_ocr b ON a.ocr_no = b.ocr_no AND b.character_no = #{characterNo} WHERE a.ocr_no = #{ocrNo} AND a.ocr_file_no = #{ocrFileNo}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_ocr_file WHERE ocr_no = #{ocrNo} AND anals_end_dtime IS NOT NULL
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM tb_ocr_file a JOIN tb_ocr b ON a.ocr_no = b.ocr_no AND b.character_no = #{characterNo} WHERE a.ocr_no = #{ocrNo}
SELECT ocr_no, member_no, character_no, member_dvc_no, confrm_yn FROM tb_ocr WHERE ocr_no = #{ocrNo}
